flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Wisconsin-River Falls rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.7k → $17.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Wisconsin-River Falls rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.1k → $9.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Wisconsin-River Falls fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (4.7k → 4.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Wisconsin-River Falls fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).
